meta_title: Removals Polegate | Local House Movers | Mark Ratcliffe
meta_description: House removals in Polegate from our nearby Lower Dicker depot. Full pad-wrap protection, guaranteed move date, 40+ years experience.
h1: Polegate Removals — Your Nearby Family-Run Movers
intro_paragraph: Polegate sits seven minutes from our Lower Dicker depot, so when you book Mark Ratcliffe Moving you get a genuinely local removal company — not a national chain routing a van down from the M25. We have been moving Polegate families since 1982 and we know every cul-de-sac off Polegate Drive, every speed bump on Wannock Lane and where the parking is tight on the Black Path.

sections.body_html:
Polegate sits seven minutes from our Lower Dicker depot, so when you book Mark Ratcliffe Moving you get a genuinely local removal company — not a national chain routing a van down from the M25. We have been moving Polegate families since 1982 and we know every cul-de-sac off Polegate Drive, every speed bump on Wannock Lane and where the parking is tight on the Black Path.

  • BAR-registered family business — 40+ years moving Sussex households
  • Premium pad-wrap protection on every item
  • Guaranteed move date once your 20% deposit is received
  • No charge for postponements, key waits or cancellations
  • Trained, uniformed crews in liveried vans

sections.heading: The Polegate removal services we offer
sections.body_html:
The Polegate removal services we offer

Full house removals

Single rooms, full houses, country estates. We pad-wrap, label, transport and place every item in your new home.

Learn more →

Man and van Polegate

Smaller, budget-friendly moves. Same BAR-trained crew, smaller vehicle, hourly rate.

Learn more →

Storage near Polegate

Individual steel Prestige rooms at our Lower Dicker depot. CCTV, alarmed access, monthly billing.

Learn more →

International from Polegate

Specialist UK to Thailand and worldwide door-to-door relocation service from your Polegate home.

Learn more →

Packing services

Full or fragile-only packing — our premium pad-wrap method is what separates a Mark Ratcliffe move from a generic remover.

Learn more →

Office & commercial

Out-of-hours business moves with minimal downtime. IT-equipment handling and document storage.

Learn more →

sections.heading: Why local matters when you choose a Polegate removal company
sections.body_html:
Why local matters when you choose a Polegate removal company

Choosing a local removal firm for your Polegate move is not just about convenience — it is about cost, reliability and routing knowledge. From our Lower Dicker depot, our crews reach Polegate via the A22, A27 and A2270, and they know the area's quirks: where parking is tight, which streets have low bridges, where the parking-suspension applications need to go and what time the school-run traffic builds up. National movers pricing in a Polegate job have to factor in the long empty leg back to their yard; we do not, so our quotes are typically more competitive for Polegate addresses.

We are also part of the local community. You will recognise our vans on the A22, A27 and A2270, you may have seen them at Polegate Railway Station, the Pony pub and the Old Mill, and our family has been part of Sussex life for over forty years. Many of our customers are repeat clients or referrals from neighbours we moved years earlier.

We cover Polegate town centre, Willingdon Trees, Wannock, Filching and Folkington as part of our standard Polegate service area, with no extra travel charges within these districts.

sections.heading: How we protect your possessions
sections.body_html:
How we protect your possessions

Every Polegate move uses our signature pad-wrap process. Each piece of furniture is individually wrapped in a thick quilted blanket inside your home, taped, labelled, then carried out — and only unwrapped once it is placed in its final position in your new property. This is the same method used by high-end international movers, and it is why our breakage rate is a fraction of the industry average.

sections.heading: A recent Polegate move
sections.body_html:
A recent Polegate move

Downsizing from Wannock to Polegate town

A retiring couple moving from a 4-bedroom house in Wannock into a 2-bedroom bungalow in Polegate town centre needed us to also place several pieces into storage. We pad-wrapped, moved and containerised across one day — and they only had to unpack what they wanted in their new home.

sections.heading: What sets us apart from generic national movers
sections.body_html:
What sets us apart from generic national movers

Generic national removal firms quote your move based on volume and postcode distance — but they cover everywhere, so they know nowhere. They will not know the parking restrictions on your street, the tight stairwell in the older terraces, or the school-run window that determines whether a 7.5-tonne lorry can manoeuvre at 8.30am. We do. We are also accountable locally — many of our customers are repeat clients or referrals from neighbours, so the move-day experience matters to us in a way that a national chain simply cannot replicate. And finally, on price: our quotes typically beat the nationals on local moves because we are not pricing in the empty leg back to a Midlands depot.

sections.heading: What to expect on move day with us
sections.body_html:
What to expect on move day with us

Our crews follow the same routine on every move, regardless of property size: arrive 8.00–8.30am, walk the rooms with you, lay floor protection, pad-wrap furniture in the room before carrying out, load in a planned sequence, walk through the empty house with you before locking up, head to the new address, unload in reverse order placing furniture in the right room, unwrap and place each item, beds reassembled, final walk-through, sign-off. The whole process for a typical 3-bedroom local move runs 8am to 3-4pm.

sections.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.body_html:
Frequently Asked Questions

How long does a typical Polegate house move take?

A 2 or 3-bedroom local move from Polegate usually completes within a single day. A 4 or 5-bedroom or longer-distance move may need two days. We will tell you honestly during the survey.

Can you handle narrow-access streets in Polegate?

Yes. We have shuttle vehicles for the tighter terraces off the Black Path and Polegate Drive. Our survey identifies access constraints in advance so the move-day team has the right vehicle.

Do you offer same-day man and van in Polegate?

Sometimes — diary permitting. If you need a single bulky item moved or a small flat clearance, give us a call and we will tell you what we can fit in.
